note: Generated by scripts/scrape_sts2_wiki_builds.py; re-run to refresh.

builds.title: Regent Forge Build
builds.description: Power up Sovereign Blade through Forge effects until each swing becomes a virtual apocalypse. The Regent's most consistent and straightforward scaling archetype — Forge your weapon, then destroy everything.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Seeking Edge
card_acquisition_priority.note: Premium Forge card. Adds significant permanent damage to Sovereign Blade. Always take.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Sword Sage
card_acquisition_priority.note: Doubles all Forge gains. Makes every other Forge card twice as effective. Transformative.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Conqueror
card_acquisition_priority.note: Forge + Stars cost. High Forge value when you have Stars to spend.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Falling Star
card_acquisition_priority.note: Starting deck card. Deals damage + generates Stars. Upgrade priority.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Glow
card_acquisition_priority.note: Generate Stars efficiently. Fuel for Forge cards and Star-cost abilities.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Child of the Stars
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain Block based on Stars generated. Late-game defensive powerhouse.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Heirloom Hammer
card_acquisition_priority.note: Play Sovereign Blade an extra time per turn. Double the value of all your Forge investment.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Refine Blade
card_acquisition_priority.note: Cheap Forge card available early. Less powerful than Seeking Edge but easier to find.

best.name: Divine Right
best.note: Regent's starter relic. Generates Stars at the start of combat, fueling Forge cards immediately.

best.name: Lantern
best.note: Gain 1 extra Energy on turn 1. Crucial for playing Forge cards early.

best.name: Bag of Marbles
best.note: Apply Vulnerable to all enemies turn 1. Amplifies already-massive Sovereign Blade damage.

good.name: Pen Nib
good.note: Every 10th attack deals double damage. Time this with a fully Forged Sovereign Blade for devastating hits.

good.name: Vajra
good.note: +1 Strength amplifies Sovereign Blade and all attack damage. Simple and effective.

good.name: Ornamental Fan
good.note: Gain 4 Block every 3 attacks. Helps survive while Forging in the first few turns.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Forge builds need to play Sovereign Blade + Forge cards + Stars generators. 6-card limit constrains key turns.

avoid.name: Ectoplasm
avoid.note: Gold is essential for buying Forge cards and relics from shops.

avoid.name: Runic Dome
avoid.note: Knowing when to Forge vs when to block is critical. Blind enemy intent makes this impossible.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Divine Right
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, gain 3 Stars.

builds.title: Regent Star Burst Build
builds.description: Stockpile massive amounts of Stars, then unleash them all at once through Stardust or Seven Stars for devastating burst damage. The ultimate 'save up and explode' strategy. One of the biggest dopamine hits in the game.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Stardust
card_acquisition_priority.note: Primary win condition. Deals damage based on Stars spent. 25 Stars = 25+ hits of damage.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Seven Stars
card_acquisition_priority.note: Alternative finisher. Massive single-hit damage scaling with Star count.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Black Hole
card_acquisition_priority.note: Passive damage per turn based on Star count. Makes stockpiling itself deal damage.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Glow
card_acquisition_priority.note: Efficient Star generation. Core engine card — take every copy.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Child of the Stars
card_acquisition_priority.note: Gain Block based on Stars. Essential defense while building up the burst.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Gather Light
card_acquisition_priority.note: Generate Stars. Reliable Star source that keeps the engine fueled.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Genesis
card_acquisition_priority.note: Reset Energy to max. Enables massive burst turns when spending all Stars.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Pillar of Creation
card_acquisition_priority.note: Passive bonus triggered by Star generation. Amplifies the engine.

best.name: Divine Right
best.note: Regent's starter relic. Free Stars at combat start gives the stockpiling a head start.

best.name: Lantern
best.note: Extra Energy turn 1 lets you play multiple Star generators immediately.

best.name: Bag of Preparation
best.note: Draw 2 extra cards turn 1. Find Star generators and setup pieces faster.

good.name: Vajra
good.note: +1 Strength amplifies Stardust and Seven Stars damage. Simple multiplicative bonus.

good.name: Ornamental Fan
good.note: Gain 4 Block every 3 attacks. Passive defense while building Stars.

good.name: Anchor
good.note: Start with 10 Block. Buys time for the Star accumulation phase.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Burst turns require playing many Star-spending cards. 6-card limit caps your explosive potential.

avoid.name: Ectoplasm
avoid.note: Gold is critical for purchasing key cards like Stardust and Seven Stars from shops.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: Enemies gain Strength while you spend 3-4 turns stockpiling. Extra damage compounds dangerously.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Divine Right
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, gain 3 Stars.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Lantern
key_relics_sidebar.note: Start each combat with an additional Energy.

builds.title: Regent Void Form Build
builds.description: Bend the rules of resource management with Void Form — end your turn early, but make your first 2 cards free. Combined with Energy conservation and high-value bombs, every turn becomes a surgical strike. The Regent's most cerebral archetype, rewarding perfect card sequencing.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Void Form
card_acquisition_priority.note: First 2 cards each turn are free. Unlocks 0-cost Seven Stars, Decisions Decisions, and other expensive bombs.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Decisions, Decisions
card_acquisition_priority.note: Draw 3, play a Skill 3 times. For free with Void Form. Triples your best Skill each turn.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Convergence
card_acquisition_priority.note: Retain hand + gain Energy/Star next turn. The perfect setup card for Void Form bomb turns.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Big Bang
card_acquisition_priority.note: 0 cost: Draw 1, gain 1 Energy, 1 Star, 5 Forge. Exhaust. Maximum efficiency in one card.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Seven Stars
card_acquisition_priority.note: 7 damage x7 to all enemies. For free via Void Form. One of the best AoE finishers in the game.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Glow
card_acquisition_priority.note: 1 Energy for 1 Star + draw 2. Efficient Star generation and draw to find bomb cards.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Comet
card_acquisition_priority.note: 33 damage + 3 Vulnerable + 3 Weak. Free via Void Form. Excellent single-target burst.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Cloak of Stars
card_acquisition_priority.note: 1 Star for 7 Block. Cheap defense that doesn't use Energy, preserving it for bigger plays.

best.name: Divine Right
best.note: Regent's starter. Stars at combat start help fuel early Star-cost cards before Void Form is online.

best.name: Ice Cream
best.note: Conserve Energy between turns. Save Energy on Convergence turns, spend big on Void Form turns.

best.name: Lantern
best.note: Extra Energy turn 1. Play Void Form on turn 1 with a Lantern to start the engine immediately.

good.name: Bag of Preparation
good.note: Draw 2 extra cards turn 1. Find Void Form and Convergence faster.

good.name: Pen Nib
good.note: Every 10th Attack deals double damage. Time this with a free Seven Stars for 98 AoE damage.

good.name: Vajra
good.note: +1 Strength amplifies all damage cards, especially multi-hit free plays.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Void Form makes 2 cards free but you still want to play more cards per turn. 6-card limit hurts.

avoid.name: Ectoplasm
avoid.note: Gold is essential for purchasing key expensive cards like Seven Stars and Decisions, Decisions.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: +1 enemy Strength while you spend turns setting up. Dangerous during the ramp phase.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Divine Right
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, gain 3 Stars.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Ice Cream
key_relics_sidebar.note: Energy is now conserved between turns.

builds.title: Regent Bombardment Build
builds.description: Rain cosmic destruction on all enemies. This AoE-focused build uses Bombardment, Meteor Shower, and Gamma Blast to obliterate groups while Knockout Blow handles single targets. The Regent's most aggressive and straightforward archetype — less engine, more explosions.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Bombardment
card_acquisition_priority.note: AoE damage + Forge for Sovereign Blade. Dual purpose: both direct and scaling damage.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Meteor Shower
card_acquisition_priority.note: Massive multi-hit AoE. Wrecks groups and deals heavy boss damage with Vulnerable.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Gamma Blast
card_acquisition_priority.note: Star-cost AoE damage. Converts accumulated Stars into immediate destruction.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Knockout Blow
card_acquisition_priority.note: 30 damage single-target. Recovers 5 Stars on kill. Premium boss and elite finisher.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Glow
card_acquisition_priority.note: 1 Star + draw 2. Fuels Star-cost AoE cards while cycling through the deck.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Crush Under
card_acquisition_priority.note: Damage + Vulnerable. Sets up Meteor Shower and Bombardment for amplified damage.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Bulwark
card_acquisition_priority.note: Strong Block card. Necessary defense between AoE burst turns.

card_acquisition_priority.name: Cosmic Indifference
card_acquisition_priority.note: Early game AoE with Stars. Provides consistent clearing before bigger AoE cards come online.

best.name: Divine Right
best.note: Regent's starter. Stars fuel Gamma Blast and Star-cost AoE cards immediately.

best.name: Bag of Marbles
best.note: Apply Vulnerable to all enemies turn 1. Amplifies all your AoE damage significantly.

best.name: Akabeko
best.note: First Attack each combat deals +8 damage. Powerful with Bombardment or Knockout Blow as openers.

good.name: Vajra
good.note: +1 Strength amplifies all multi-hit attacks. Multiplicative with Meteor Shower's many hits.

good.name: Strike Dummy
good.note: Striking cards deal +3 damage. Many Regent attack cards benefit from this generic damage boost.

good.name: Ornamental Fan
good.note: 4 Block every 3 Attacks. Passive defense from playing many attack cards.

avoid.name: Velvet Choker
avoid.note: Burst turns may require 6+ card plays for maximum AoE output.

avoid.name: Snecko Eye
avoid.note: Randomized costs can make your burst turns unpredictable. The build needs reliable Energy for big attacks.

avoid.name: Philosopher Stone
avoid.note: Enemies gain +1 Strength. Your aggressive build already takes hits — extra enemy damage is dangerous.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Divine Right
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, gain 3 Stars.

key_relics_sidebar.name: Bag of Marbles
key_relics_sidebar.note: At the start of each combat, apply 1 Vulnerable to ALL enemies.
